{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Sect of Twin Stars
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Sect of Twin Stars]] is an organization that appears confident.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Sect of Twin Stars]] finds [[Ziel]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
